'''√ng-b-f''' ('''kangabaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quickdrop|quickdrop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-b-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quickdrop|quickdrop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ng-b-f
|-
! Lemma
| kangabaf
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thingabaf || jingabaf || shingabaf || kingabaf
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthungabaf || jujungabaf || shushungabaf || kukungabaf
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thungabaf || jungabaf || shungabaf || kungabaf
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thungabaf || jungabaf || shungabaf || kungabaf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thengabaf || jengabaf || shengabaf || kengabaf
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothongabaf || jojongabaf || shoshongabaf || kokongabaf
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thongabaf || jongabaf || shongabaf || kongabaf
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thongabaf || jongabaf || shongabaf || kongabaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngabaf || ngabaf || ngabaf || ngabaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngabaf || ngabaf || ngabaf || ngabaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngabaf || ngabaf || ngabaf || ngabaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngabaf || ngabaf || ngabaf || ngabaf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thængabaf || jængabaf || shængabaf || kængabaf
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathangabaf || jajangabaf || shashangabaf || kakangabaf
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thangabaf || jangabaf || shangabaf || kangabaf
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thangabaf || jangabaf || shangabaf || kangabaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shangabaf
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshangabaf
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishangabaf
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shangabafnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshangabafnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishangabafnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shangabafshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshangabafnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishangabafshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shangabafro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshangabafnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishangabafro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shangabafmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshangabafnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishangabafmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shangabafsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshangabafnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishangabafsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shangabafng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshangabafnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishangabafng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shangabafya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshangabafnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishangabafya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shangabafyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshangabafnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishangabafyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shangabafnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshangabafnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishangabafnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shangabafnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangabafnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangabafnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shangabafnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshangabafnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangabafnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shangabafshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshangabafnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishangabafshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shangabafshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangabafnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangabafshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shangabafshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshangabafnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangabafshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shangabafronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshangabafnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishangabafronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shangabafroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshangabafnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishangabafroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shangabafromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshangabafnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangabafromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shangabafmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshangabafnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishangabafmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shangabafmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshangabafnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishangabafmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shangabafmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangabafnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangabafmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
